name: adr009-mojo-test-file-splitting
description: Split Mojo test files that exceed the ADR-009 limit of 10 fn test_ functions per file to prevent heap corruption (libKGENCompilerRTShared.so) in Mojo v0.26.1 CI. Use when: (1) a Mojo test file has more than 10 fn test_ functions, (2) CI shows intermittent non-deterministic failures in a test group, (3) implementing ADR-009 compliance for new or existing test files.
